name: ocean potential temperature and salinity
Introduction: This dataset provides 3D fields of ocean potential temperature and salinity on the lat-lon-cap 90 (llc90) native model grid from the ECCO Version 4 Release 4 (V4r4) ocean and sea-ice state estimate. The dataset is provided on daily-average and monthly-average time resolution. Snapshot data of ocean potential temperature and salinity are also provided.
